title: 世界のオールラウンダー

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the mighty All-Rounder, Agnes Digital has
dominated her first three years in the Twinkle
Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There is nothing left for her to conquer, yet her
gaze is locked on the top of a ramp.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
A great sage once said that walking your path
means being true to yourself...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I have climbed every ramp there is, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But once you've reached the top, where does that
path lead? After you finish climbing, what comes
next?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
A conventional answer. But take a look at this
conundrum through the eyes of a fanatic.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Lower yourself as if in worship and, from there,
follow the trajectory of the ramp.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I stoop down just as she asks and look up the
ramp to find...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The sky. The road up leads to the sky.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Can you see it—the path I have yet to conquer?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I'll cross the skies and take on the whole world!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And then...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
So, you're really leaving. Good luck out there,
Digital.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Still, I'm astonished that you set your sights on
running internationally. I hadn't heard even a
whisper of such a grand ambition before.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Well, it's only natural I didn't mention it before. I
mean, the idea just came to me.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But I'm the All-Rounder! That means I have to
conquer every racecourse there is!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: That includes every racecourse around the world. In fact, I can't truly call myself that until I've won all around the world, can I?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Wow... Now that you mention it, that makes
sense. You're incredible, Digital!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Anyone can see she's incredible at a single
glance. ...But Agnes Digital herself knows there's
an even bigger reason.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But being the All-Rounder isn't the only reason I
want to travel the world. I have this... absurdly
intense feeling... that cannot be contained...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
What is this feeling? Whatever could it be,
Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As her partner, I speak for her loud and clear.
choice_data_list:
WE WANT TO MEET ALL THE UMAMUSUME
IN THE WORLD!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Whaaaat?! All the Umamusume... in the whole world?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Interesting. You've aggrandized indulgence to its
most extreme heights. So, that is the desire you
wish to sate?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
That's right. All I want is to see cute Umamusume
that are even stronger than me!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I wanna chase all of them, run by their side, and
then connect with them! It's an urge I can't
contain!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: That's why... I have to go!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I understand. In which case, I pray thee go forth
hale and hearty. But know this...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
There are many rulers abroad whose strength
rivals that of even the Overlord—the Trade Hawk
of Hong Kong, and the Oil Tycoon of Dubai, to
name a few.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
However versatile you may be, your opponents
will have the home advantage. Are you certain
you can win?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
S-sure, racers abroad might be more comfortable
on their home terrain...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: But I'll have an advantage too!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Because wherever I go, there'll be precious Umas
waiting! So long as that's true, there's no limit to
what I can do!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: And on top of that...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: There's more?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ah... Actually, the last bit's not important. It
probably isn't worth mentioning...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(On top of that, I have Opera O's, Doto's, and
many other's blessings.)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: (And I'll always have them to support me.)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: All right, Trainer—my partner in crime—let's go!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna travel the world with my dear comrade
in arms to see the things I love!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't get more exhilarating than this! If we
keep this up, then the world will be our
all-you-can-simp buffet!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital sets off on her journey with her
head held high and proud. As a result...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital is in the lead! She's done it! An
effortless victory in Hong Kong! Her skill knows
no bounds!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital snatches an overwhelming victory
in Dubai, piercing through the arid heat!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Opera O! Did you see Digital?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. Her feats are truly astounding. She's won
her way through country after country without so
much as a glance back home.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: It appears there is no path ill-suited to her.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: You don't think she's tired?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: She will not fall at the hands of exhaustion.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
For she is the All-Rounder, traveling the world
with a love for Umamusume unmatched by any.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital's passion is not bound by
international borders. Where her heart leads, she
goes running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Many racers have achieved victory abroad, but
only the All-Rounder could dash to and fro so
completely unfettered.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
OOOOHOOHOO! PRAISE BE FOR
UMAMUSUMEEE!
